tr.t-attf-style: padding:0px 20px 0px 20px; margin:0; font-family: Arial,Helvetica, sans-serif; background:#fff;

span.t-attf-style: color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id and o.company_id.company_color or '#ffffff'};
padding: 10px 0px; color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id and o.company_id.company_color or '#ffffff'};
padding: 10px 0px; color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id and o.company_id.company_color or '#ffffff'};

table.t-attf-style: padding:0px 10px; color: #{'#000000'}; border:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'} !important;

tr.t-attf-style: color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_text_color or '#000000'}; background-color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'};

td.t-attf-style: padding:0px 10px; color: #{'#000000'}; border-right:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'} !important;
padding:0px 10px; color: #{'#000000'}; border-right:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'} !important;

table.t-attf-style: font-size:12px; margin:0; font-family: Arial,Helvetica, sans-serif; background:#fff; line-height:20px; border:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'};

tr.t-attf-style: padding:5px 10px; border:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'}; font-weight:bold; background-color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'}; color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_text_color or '#000000'};

td.t-attf-style: padding:5px 10px; color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_text_color or '#000000'}; border:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'} !important; border-right:0px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'} !important; font-weight:bold;

th.t-attf-style: padding:0px 10px; color: #{'#000000'}; border:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'} !important; border-right:0px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'} !important;

td.t-attf-style: padding:0px 10px; color: #{'#000000'}; border:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'} !important; border-right:0px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'} !important;

table.t-attf-style: font-size:12px; margin:0; font-family: Arial,Helvetica, sans-serif; background:#fff; line-height:20px; border:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'};

tr.t-attf-style: padding:5px 10px; border:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'}; font-weight:bold; background-color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'}; color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_text_color or '#000000'};

td.t-attf-style: padding:5px 10px; color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_text_color or '#000000'}; border:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'} !important; border-right:0px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'} !important; font-weight:bold;

padding:5px 10px; color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_text_color or '#000000'}; border:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'} !important; border-right:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'} !important; font-weight:bold;

table.t-attf-style: font-size:12px; margin:0; font-family: Arial,Helvetica, sans-serif; background:#fff; line-height:20px; border:1px solid #fff

tbody.table:
Paid by :
Payment Mode :
Payment Journal :
TOTAL PAID AMOUNT
For
-->
